# Security Policy

## Scope

This repo contains prompt profiles and documentation only.
There is no executable code, no server, and no user data collected.

## Reporting a concern

If you find content that could be used to cause harm, open a private issue
or contact the maintainer directly. Do not open a public issue.

## What counts as a security concern here

- A profile that could be used to bypass AI safety measures
- A free-resources entry linking to a malicious or deceptive site
- A PR that injects harmful instructions into profiles

## Response time

Issues will be reviewed within 72 hours.
